body.intention: Every inference request leaves exactly one JSON record naming each escalation hop, which model served it, and what it claimed — including when the walk HALTS, and without duplicating the payloads it references.

body.why: io_corpus captured every byte of all 1948 calls, but nothing represented a REQUEST. CC searched for a truncated reply, looked in the wrong store, and filed a ticket asserting the data did not exist while 19216 chars of it sat on disk. The capture was never the problem — findability was. A builder you cannot read is a builder you cannot let run unattended, which is why this gates the background-builder milestone.
